log.reply: Voice input is smart.  consultants live on calls.  Kill any manual editing or categories in v1.
Solo freelancers, voice after calls, clean card to client. That's the only loop that survives. Want the live preview?

I'd kill any editing or formatting tools in v1. The premium feel comes from the AI just getting it right the first time.

One wow moment: the card lands with perfect tone, bullet points, and a single suggested next step, all under ten seconds. One cut: no client accounts or logins, just a shareable link.

Want the tight v1 plan locked so we can build the preview?
Locked. Dark premium UI, voice to perfect card, shareable timeline. Say build it.

continuousImprovements: Add a subtle timestamp and call length to each card so it feels real-time. Lock that next?
Second angle: auto-detect the client's name from the voice note and tag the card so the timeline stays organized without extra effort. Lock that?
Empty state gets a one-tap record prompt with a sample client card. Mobile needs that or it feels like a website. Lock?
